'''Sandro the Hook''' was a criminal who bought stolen goods. He was a junk dealer living on [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]] who had past dealings with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bortrek]]. Occasionally, he would sell them for high prices to willing buyers with a large amount of money. If the person who wished to purchase something from Sandro pulled out of a deal while a transaction was under way, he would hire a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] to finish the job. At one point, Sandro was dealing with a bounty hunter who killed three of his hired bounty hunters before finally being murdered on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], while looking for parts for his [[Starship/Legends|ship]].
